description_for_human: Authenticate clients and get onboarding, facility, and outreach details.
description_for_model: REST/OpenAPI fallback plugin for Rabo client-specific answers. First call authenticate_client with client_id and OTP. After authentication succeeds, call business functions without client_id because the server uses the authenticated session context.

functions.name: authenticate_client
functions.description: Authenticates the client session using client ID and OTP.

functions.name: get_client_onboarding_status
functions.description: Returns onboarding status for the authenticated client.

functions.name: get_client_basic_info
functions.description: Returns either the name or family value for the authenticated client.

functions.name: get_client_facility_limit
functions.description: Returns the authenticated client's name and current facility limit in EUR.

functions.name: summarize_client_outreach
functions.description: Returns outreach highlights for the authenticated client, including reasons and total questions to answer.
